name: Hank Argent
description:
He hurt you in the past...

...now, he was making up for it.

"I'm sorry that I let you down. I let you down."

(Used an image of Killer Croc from the 2004 Batman animated series. Again, I'm not a good artist and like with Echo, I can't see anyone else being Hank other than Killer Croc. Again, please, don't kill me)
creator: PinkietheDragon
